title: vilfa humilis
intro: Vilfa humilis, also known as common hairgrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Vilfa humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
